name: @twiglylabs/trellis
description: Lightweight CLI for managing plans with dependencies

scripts.build: node build.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json 2>&1 | bark convert tsc --gate build
scripts.publish:local: npm run build && npm publish --registry http://localhost:4873
scripts.test: vitest run --reporter=verbose --reporter=json --outputFile=.bark/.vitest-raw.json; bark convert vitest .bark/.vitest-raw.json --gate unit-tests
scripts.test:dist: npm run build && vitest run tests/dist-integration.test.ts
